name: Grimjaw
who:
Half-orc berserker of the Iron Company
Found purpose and family in the Company
Savage fighter with a simple but loyal heart
Potential companion upon completing company questline
Capt. Steele sees potential in him despite his wild nature
what:
Company's shock trooper and heavy assault specialist
Front-line devastation expert
Offers training in berserker techniques
Potential companion if chosen over Kira
where:
Dalhurst - Iron Company Barracks
Available as companion after questline completion
quests: Iron Company Captain's Hand reward choice

sprite.notes: Large half-orc with green-tinged skin, massive two-handed axe

dialogue.notes: Speaks in broken common, surprisingly philosophical about battle

combat.notes: Glass cannon - highest HP and damage, lower defense when raging

follower.notes: Devastating damage dealer, AoE cleave, fear effects
